description_long: This object consists of a group of three stylized mushrooms, each with distinct cap shapes and colors. The first mushroom has a wide, tan cap with a slightly wavy margin and a slender, light brown stem. The second mushroom features a classic red cap with white spots, reminiscent of the Amanita muscaria, and a short, thick, grayish stem. The third mushroom has a dark brown, conical cap and a thin, white stem with a black base. The caps display a variety of surface patterns, including smooth, spotted, and slightly textured finishes. The stems are straight and vary in thickness and color, with some showing subtle shading to indicate depth. The overall appearance is stylized and simplified, suitable for decorative or illustrative use in an urban park or garden setting.
description: A group of three stylized mushrooms with varied cap shapes and colors, including tan, red with white spots, and dark brown caps, each with distinct stems.
description_view_0: Two mushrooms are prominent: one with a tan, wavy cap and another with a dark brown, conical cap; a third, white-capped mushroom is partially visible.
description_view_1: The tan-capped mushroom is seen from below, revealing its stem, while the red, spotted mushroom and the dark brown cap are both clearly visible.
description_view_2: The red, spotted mushroom is in the foreground, with the tan and dark brown mushrooms behind, showing the underside of the tan cap.
description_view_3: The red, spotted mushroom and the dark brown, conical mushroom are most visible, with the tan-capped mushroom seen from the side.
